focus: implementation handoff, packet topology, risks, acceptance criteria

graphEvents.label: Implementation sequence covers indexFiles options, scan handler mode, capturesToNodes dedupe, response fields, tests, build, runtime scan
Full scan should return active-code scale 1000-3000 files and must smoke query/context/status
Acceptance requires incremental:false scan with filesScanned >=1000, zero errors, and new response fields

summary: Use nested packet 012-code-graph-context-and-scan-scope/002-incremental-fullscan-recovery for the fix.
rationale: Packet 012 introduced the scan-scope changes that exposed the regression.
Sub-folder versioning supports returning to old work and separating temporal iterations.
Sibling 013 already exists as 006-claude-hook-findings-remediation, so 013-code-graph-scan-incremental-flag-fix would collide.
ruledOut: new sibling 014 unless nested packets are operationally blocked

summary: Use Level 3 docs for the nested remediation packet.
reason: The code diff is small, but the work needs ADRs, risk matrix, DB/operator acceptance, and response-shape compatibility notes.

summary: Add IndexFilesOptions and optional skipFreshFiles parameter with default true.
Gate isFileStale only when skipFreshFiles is true.
Deduplicate capturesToNodes symbolIds with first-seen preservation.
Add additive fullScanRequested and effectiveIncremental scan response fields.
Restart MCP server and run incremental:false full scan; assert filesScanned >=1000 and no errors.
Full scan grows from 33 files back toward active-code scale and may stress scan duration/query tools.
mitigation: Measure full-scan duration, assert totalFiles in 1000-3000 range, and smoke code_graph_query/code_graph_context/code_graph_status before completion.

summary: Duplicate-symbol dedupe lets formerly failing files index but may drop legitimate overload/lexical symbols.
mitigation: Quantify dropped duplicates by file during acceptance; keep richer parser scoping as a deferred follow-up.

summary: code_graph_scan incremental:false returns status ok and data.filesScanned >= 1000.
code_graph_scan response includes data.fullScanRequested true and data.effectiveIncremental false.
code_graph_query, code_graph_context, and code_graph_status response shapes remain backward-compatible under the larger graph.
Do not create sibling 013-code-graph-scan-incremental-flag-fix because sibling 013 already exists.
